# Koladele Olaitan - Senior Frontend Engineer & Technical Lead

> Building high-performance web applications at the intersection of AI, data, and modern web technologies.

## Overview

Koladele Olaitan is a Senior Frontend Engineer and Technical Lead with 6+ years of experience architecting high-performance web applications using React, Vue.js, and TypeScript. He has a proven track record leading frontend teams, driving performance optimization, and shipping scalable products used by thousands of users across 50+ countries. He has strong full-stack capabilities with Python and Node.js backend experience.

## Current Role

**Founding Frontend Engineer at GetDot.ai** (Jan 2023 - Present)
- Lead frontend engineer driving UI architecture for an AI-powered data analyst platform trusted by Duolingo, Choco, Airbyte, and BlaBlaCar, serving 50+ enterprise clients.
- Led technical design and implementation of advanced data lineage visualization system, resulting in 60% improvement in user workflow efficiency and competitive differentiation.
- Spearheaded a comprehensive redesign of the Dot application, overhauling UI/UX patterns, navigation flows, and visual hierarchy to significantly improve usability and user satisfaction.
- Built full-stack features across frontend and backend using Vue.js, TypeScript, and Python, supporting 70-100K monthly queries.
- Led migration from TestCafe to Playwright for E2E testing and fixed CI pipeline concurrency issues, reducing flaky test failures.
- Reduced bundle size by 25% and improved Core Web Vitals scores by 40% through code splitting, lazy loading, and performance optimization.

## Professional Experience

### Lead Frontend Engineer at InfluxAI (Jun 2024 - Apr 2025)
- AI Blockchain Analytics | Johannesburg, SA | Remote | Contract
- Led frontend development of a blockchain analytics dashboard with AI-powered chat, smart contract scanning, wallet profiling, and token safety scoring using React, TypeScript, and Next.js.
- Architected and shipped a major dashboard rebuild, introducing subscription management, trending token discovery, and real-time DEX transaction views.
- Built AI chat interface with contextual token analysis, network-aware filtering, improving user engagement with on-chain data.
- Developed the company marketing website and token claim client, integrating Web3 wallet connections and on-chain transaction verification.
- Implemented dynamic safety score visualizations, smart contract flag severity systems, and wallet detail views for multi-network token analysis.

### Lead Frontend Engineer at HumDov (Jul 2023 - Jan 2025)
- Enterprise CMS | Texas, US | Remote
- Led a cross-functional team of 4+ frontend developers, delivering 15+ features on schedule with 99.9% uptime for an enterprise CMS platform.
- Architected a modular React component library and design system, reducing development time by 50% and ensuring consistent UI across 20+ pages.
- Established CI/CD pipelines with automated testing, cutting deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes.
- Mentored 3 junior developers through code reviews and pair programming, achieving 100% team retention and skill advancement.
- Led the recruitment process for 2 senior and 1 mid-level developer through technical interviews and onboarding.

### Frontend Engineer at HumDov (Nov 2022 - Jun 2023)
- Enterprise CMS | Texas, US | Remote
- Developed responsive React components and REST API integrations, contributing to 40% improvement in user engagement metrics.
- Implemented automated testing with Jest and React Testing Library, achieving 85% code coverage and reducing production bugs by 45%.
- Optimized bundle size through code splitting and analysis, improving page load times by 35%.

### Web Developer at Unlimited.ng (Nov 2020 - Jul 2021)
- Education | Kwara, Nigeria
- Built a full-stack bootcamp registration platform using React and Node.js, automating enrollment and reducing administrative overhead by 60%.
- Trained and mentored 5+ students in web development fundamentals through a structured curriculum, achieving 100% course completion rate and 80% job placement.

## Core Technical Skills

### Frontend
- React, Vue.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js
- GSAP, Tailwind CSS, CSS Architecture
- Performance Optimization, Core Web Vitals
- Component Libraries, Design Systems

### Backend
- Python, Node.js
- REST API Development
- Supabase, Database Integration

### Testing & DevOps
- Playwright, Jest, React Testing Library
- CI/CD Pipelines, Automated Testing
- Code Splitting, Bundle Optimization

### Specializations
- AI-Powered Application Interfaces
- Data Visualization & Lineage Systems
- Web3 & Blockchain Frontends
- Technical Team Leadership & Mentoring

## Side Projects

### Auritrack
- AI-powered personal finance platform with smart bank statement imports, spending predictions, and Telegram bot integration.
- Founded and built a full-stack finance management app with AI chat, Telegram bot, smart bank statement imports, and spending predictions.
- Trusted by 100,000+ users across 50+ countries with a 4.8/5 rating.
- Built with React, TypeScript, Next.js, Supabase, and Python.
- Website: https://www.auritrack.com/

## What Koladele Can Help With

- Frontend architecture and UI development for complex web applications
- AI-powered application interfaces and data visualization
- Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals improvement

- Design system and component library architecture
- CI/CD pipeline setup and testing strategy

Koladele is available for jobs, gigs, contracts, collaborations, and enquiries. Most client work is under NDA and cannot be publicly disclosed.
